CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jun-14-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Garry Cohen, Esq. for Plaintiff: Burk Properties, LLC.
Plaintiff's Witness: Tim F. Jones, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Joseph V. DeMarco as follows:
Damages $41,597.00
Attorney's Fees $2,800.00
Costs $574.50, for a total of $44,971.50
Judgment signed in open court.
